# HABADTE User Stories\nGenerated by AS400REVENG-Agent-3 | Run: 202606290854 | HABADTE is an AS400 legacy system that processes patient encounter data with file indicator validation and inpatient/outpatient flag routing logic\n\n## Summary: Stories: 3 | Epics: 1 | PHI-Sensitive: 0 | PO Review Needed: 1\n## Stats: Members: 37 | Completeness: 82.2% | Rules: 19 | Auto-Accepted: 3 | Tech Debt: 0 hrs\n\n## Epic: Uncategorized Business Logic\n\n### US-2026-001: File indicator zero skip branch\nAs a System User,\nI want to branch to SKIP when file indicator equals zero, So that the system handles empty file conditions correctly.\nAC-01: System enforces the rule condition. AC-02: Handles failure path without data corruption.\nRule: BR-017 | Prog: HABADTE | Conf: 0.87 | PHI: No\nWARNING: low confidence - requires Product Owner review\n\n### US-2026-002: Flag indicator void skip branch\nAs a System User,\nI want to branch to SKIP when flag indicator equals void/voided, So that voided records are excluded from processing.\nAC-01: System enforces the rule condition. AC-02: Handles failure path without data corruption.\nRule: BR-018 | Prog: HABADTE | Conf: 0.95 | PHI: No\n\n### US-2026-003: Outpatient flag skip branch\nAs a System User,\nI want to branch to SKIP when inpatient/outpatient flag equals outpatient, So that outpatient encounters are filtered appropriately.\nAC-01: System enforces the rule condition.
